wards_bengaluru_gba.label: Greater Bengaluru Wards (2025)
wards_bengaluru_gba.description: Greater Bengaluru Authority — 369 final wards across 5 corporations, notified Nov 2025.
wards_bengaluru_gba.notes: Latest GBA delimitation. Pair with the 5-corp polygons for parent grouping.

corporation_bengaluru.label: Greater Bengaluru Corporations (2025)
corporation_bengaluru.description: Five corporation-level polygons that make up the Greater Bengaluru Authority.
corporation_bengaluru.notes: Parent polygons for the 369 GBA wards.

wards_bengaluru_bbmp_2022.label: BBMP Wards (2022, historical)
wards_bengaluru_bbmp_2022.description: Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike — 243 wards from the 2022 draft delimitation. Historical reference; superseded by the 2025 GBA 369-ward scheme.
wards_bengaluru_bbmp_2022.notes: Use the GBA 2025 layer for current ward boundaries.

bda_jurisdiction.label: BDA Jurisdiction
bda_jurisdiction.description: Bengaluru Development Authority planning + acquisition jurisdiction boundary.
bda_jurisdiction.notes: Single polygon. Useful as a boundary mask for any BDA-scoped analysis.

bda_layouts.label: BDA Approved Layouts
bda_layouts.description: BDA-approved residential and commercial layout boundaries within the BDA jurisdiction.

wards_chennai.label: Chennai (GCC) Wards
wards_chennai.description: Greater Chennai Corporation — 200 ward boundaries across the 15 zones.

wards_hyderabad.label: Hyderabad (GHMC) Wards
wards_hyderabad.description: Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation — 145 wards across 6 zones.

wards_mumbai.label: Mumbai (BMC) Wards
wards_mumbai.description: Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation — 24 administrative wards (A–T plus the city-island spread).

electoral_wards_mumbai_2017.label: Mumbai Electoral Wards (2017)
electoral_wards_mumbai_2017.description: 227 electoral ward divisions of Mumbai, 2017 delimitation. Use for election + civic-rep maps.

wards_kolkata.label: Kolkata (KMC) Wards
wards_kolkata.description: Kolkata Municipal Corporation — 141 ward boundaries across the 16 boroughs.

wards_ahmedabad.label: Ahmedabad (AMC) Wards
wards_ahmedabad.description: Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation — 48 wards across the 7 zones.

wards_gurugram.label: Gurugram (MCG) Wards
wards_gurugram.description: Municipal Corporation of Gurugram — 35 ward boundaries.

wards_kochi.label: Kochi (KMC) Wards
wards_kochi.description: Kochi Municipal Corporation ward boundaries — 74 administrative wards covering the city. Sourced from Oorvani Foundation's OpenCity data portal.

wards_bhubaneshwar.label: Bhubaneshwar (BMC) Wards
wards_bhubaneshwar.description: Bhubaneshwar Municipal Corporation ward boundaries — 67 wards covering Odisha's capital city. Sourced from Oorvani Foundation's OpenCity data portal.

wards_thane.label: Thane (TMC) Wards
wards_thane.description: Thane Municipal Corporation — 47 wards across the city.

layers.notes: Authoritative state and Union Territory boundaries from India's Local Government Directory (LGD). 36 polygons with the full LGD code chain, enabling joins with district, subdistrict, block and village layers.
Survey of India derivative.
NRSC/ISRO Bhuvan. Own codes, not LGD.

Every district in India from the Local Government Directory (LGD). 785 polygons; joins to state boundaries via the state_lgd code, with the full LGD chain for joining to subdistricts, blocks and villages.
SoI derivative. Partial LGD codes.
Bhuvan. Under-counts vs LGD in some states.

All subdistricts (tehsil / taluk / mandal) in India from the Local Government Directory (LGD). 6,471 polygons with the full LGD code chain for joining to districts, states, and finer admin levels (blocks, villages).
SoI tehsils. Partial codes.
Community-development blocks across India from the Local Government Directory (LGD). 7,146 polygons with the full LGD code chain joining to subdistricts, districts and states.
Bhuvan. Predates recent re-divisions in several states.
PMGSY rural roads blocks. Block + district + state names joined from PMGSY_Masterdata (99% coverage).
Authoritative. 319k gram-panchayat polygons. Use vector tiles to render at zoom.
Authoritative. 584k polygons. Use vector tiles to render.

SoI village centroids (point geometry). 5.76 lakh point features. Coverage is dense in southern + western states and sparse in UP, Bihar, Jharkhand and several NE states (SoI source limitation, not a rendering issue).
Lok Sabha constituencies — 543 polygons covering the entire country. Latest delimitation.
State legislative assembly constituencies. Polygons keyed by ST_CODE.
India Post delivery post office pincode boundaries from data.gov.in (May 2025). 19,312 polygons. Compare with bharatviz's 63,864 finer polygons.

India Post pincode boundary polygons (simplified). 63,864 polygons. © 2025 Saket Choudhary, MIT-licensed via bharatviz.org. Source: bharatviz.org/India_pincodes_simplified.geojson; code repo github.com/saketlab/bharatviz.
Wildlife sanctuaries + national parks. Source via PM GatiShakti GIS portal.
Eco-sensitive zone boundaries from MoEFCC Parivesh. Sourced via Bharatmaps.
Forest boundary polygons from Survey of India topographic maps. Includes reserved + protected + unclassed forests.
India's Ramsar Convention wetland sites of international importance, sourced via Bharatmaps Parivesh.
All wetland boundary polygons notified under MoEFCC Wetland Rules 2017. Sourced via Bharatmaps Parivesh.
India's major river basin polygons from the Central Water Commission Water Resources Information System (WRIS).
River sub-basin polygons (one tier under basins) from CWC WRIS.
India's river network from CWC WRIS — line geometry for streams and rivers.
Greater Bengaluru Authority — 369 final wards across 5 corporations, notified Nov 2025.
Five corporation-level polygons that make up the Greater Bengaluru Authority.
Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike — 243 wards from the 2022 draft delimitation. Historical reference; superseded by the 2025 GBA 369-ward scheme.
Bengaluru Development Authority planning + acquisition jurisdiction boundary.
BDA-approved residential and commercial layout boundaries within the BDA jurisdiction.
Greater Chennai Corporation — 200 ward boundaries across the 15 zones.
Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation — 145 wards across 6 zones.
Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation — 24 administrative wards (A–T plus the city-island spread).
227 electoral ward divisions of Mumbai, 2017 delimitation. Use for election + civic-rep maps.
Kolkata Municipal Corporation — 141 ward boundaries across the 16 boroughs.
Pune Municipal Corporation — 58 administrative wards.
Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation — 48 wards across the 7 zones.
Jaipur Municipal Corporation — 150 ward boundaries.
Municipal Corporation of Gurugram — 35 ward boundaries.
Kochi Municipal Corporation ward boundaries — 74 administrative wards covering the city. Sourced from Oorvani Foundation's OpenCity data portal.
Bhubaneshwar Municipal Corporation ward boundaries — 67 wards covering Odisha's capital city. Sourced from Oorvani Foundation's OpenCity data portal.
Greater Visakhapatnam Municipal Corporation — 98 wards.
Thane Municipal Corporation — 47 wards across the city.

India's national boundary as a single MultiPolygon, derived by dissolving the 36 LGD state + UT polygons. India-correct by construction (LGD is India's authoritative admin source — includes Aksai Chin via J&K/Ladakh and the full Arunachal Pradesh claim).
1,006 historical flood event polygons across India, 1960s–2020. Compiled for hydrological modelling research; useful as a climate-adaptation reference layer.
name-only
name-only
name-only
mislabeled in upstream — block-equivalent, not village
India's 25 High Court territorial jurisdictions. Dissolved from LGD states. Filter by seat city or search by state.
National Green Tribunal's 5 zonal bench jurisdictions (2017 gazette notification). Dissolved from LGD states.
National Company Law Tribunal's 15 bench jurisdictions. Dissolved from LGD states per nclt.gov.in.
BIS IS 1893:2016 seismic risk zones II-V. Use for earthquake hazard mapping.
Dam point locations across India from Bharatmaps.
Dam point locations from CWC WRIS.
Reservoir polygons from CWC WRIS.
National highway centerlines from MoRTH via PM GatiShakti.
PHCs, CHCs, sub-centres, district hospitals from NIC HealthGIS. 147,957 points.

columns.name: habitat
columns.min: Abies pindrow, Betula utilis, Juglans regia and Picea sp. constitute the larger bulk of the tree assemblage. Indigofera hetranth, Berberis lycicum, and Rosa webbiana constitute the shrub cover of the area.
columns.max: mixed moist deciduous type of forests

columns.name: animals
columns.min: Alpine Musk Deer, Takin, Himalayan Goral, Himalayan Serow, Wild Dog, Asiatic Black Bear, Red Panda, Snow Leopard Cat, Clouded Leopard, Leopard, Spotted Linsang, Eurasian Otter, Barking Deer, Sambar, Assamese Macaque, Capped Langur, Hodgson’s Giant Flyi
columns.max: Wolf, Jackal, Jungle Cat, Bluebull; Great Indian Bustard, Houbara Bustard, Flamingoes, Cranes, Sandgrouses

columns.name: by_sea
columns.min: Frequent ship services are available for passengers traveling to Port Blair from Vishakhapatnam, Kolkata and Chennai and back. Ferry services are available to the national park
columns.max: You can take the inter-island boat service from Port Blair. The journey has been termed a trip within itself and takes about a week. Another option is to take the MV Campbell Bay, a government ship that covers the distance from Port Blair to Campbell Bay
